name: Zara Ironspark
sd_appearance: A towering, rigid figure of polished copper and glowing emerald eyes emerges from the shadows, their height and precision of movement hinting at a non-human origin. The ash-white robe of the Guild of Ashen Scrolls drapes over a threadbare under-robe, with multiple sealed scroll cases adorning their waist. A quill, symbolizing their role as a scribe, is visibly worn as a makeshift weapon, while a dagger and a tattered coat complete their ensemble. A distinctive forked tongue flickers from between the Warforged's lips, adding an eerie, yet intriguing touch to their appearance.
faction_visual: ash-white archival robes, multiple sealed scroll cases, fate-reading tools
style_note: coat over robe, always quill and parchment, forked tongue flickering
